    "Sagging flexible duct exceeding 1/2 inch per foot between supports"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-support flexible ductwork to limit sag to a maximum of 1/2 inch per foot per SMACNA and IMC standards"
  ],
  "rationale": "The flexible duct installation is roughed in but fails to meet SMACNA and IMC 603 standards due to excessive sagging (>1/2 in/ft), which restricts airflow and increases static pressure. The work is assessed at 70% complete and must be failed until corrected.",

    "IMC 603",
    "SMACNA Flexible Duct Performance and Installation Standards"
  ]
